Hero.description: ConnectX Solutions is a software development studio. We craft web applications, mobile platforms, and digital products focused on clean architecture, long-term maintainability, and real business value.

Services.title: Engineering & Design Services
Services.subtitle: End-to-end software development, from product design to deployment and ongoing maintenance.

webDev.title: Web Application Development
webDev.description: Fast, accessible web applications built with modern frameworks. We handle architecture, implementation, and deployment.

uiux.title: Product UI/UX Design
uiux.description: User-centered interfaces built around real workflows. From wireframes and prototypes to polished design systems.

product.title: Cloud & Backend Architecture
product.description: Scalable backend systems, REST and GraphQL APIs, and cloud infrastructure designed for reliability.

analytics.title: Mobile App Development
analytics.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android applications built with Flutter or React Native, integrated with your existing backend.

team.title: Development Team Extension
team.description: Need extra engineering capacity? We integrate with your existing team and sprint process to help ship faster.

security.title: Performance & Security Review
security.description: We audit existing codebases for security issues, slow load times, accessibility gaps, and SEO problems.

PortfolioShowcase.title: Projects We're Proud Of
PortfolioShowcase.subtitle: A look at some of the digital products and platforms we've helped bring to life.
PortfolioShowcase.noProjects: Portfolio projects will appear here as they are published.

Process.title: Our Development Process
Process.subtitle: A clear, structured approach that keeps you informed at every stage of your project.

step1.title: Discovery & Requirements
step1.desc: We start by understanding your goals, audience, and technical requirements. No assumptions — just clear questions and careful listening.

step2.title: Architecture & Planning
step2.desc: We map out the system architecture, data models, and project milestones before writing a single line of code.

step3.title: UI/UX Design
step3.desc: We create wireframes, interactive prototypes, and a design system that reflects your brand and serves your users.

step4.title: Development
step4.desc: Clean, well-documented code built in iterative sprints with regular check-ins. You see progress throughout the build.

step5.title: Testing & QA
step5.desc: Automated and manual testing across devices, browsers, and user flows. Security and accessibility are checked here too.

step6.title: Deployment
step6.desc: We handle the full deployment process — CI/CD pipelines, hosting configuration, DNS, and monitoring setup.

step7.title: Maintenance & Support
step7.desc: After launch, we remain available for bug fixes, updates, new features, and ongoing technical support.

WhyChooseUs.title: How We Work With You
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: We build long-term technical partnerships grounded in transparency, clean engineering, and honest communication.

feature1.title: Structured Development Process
feature1.desc: Milestone-based delivery with regular demos so you always know where your project stands.

feature2.title: Clean, Maintainable Code
feature2.desc: TypeScript, modular architecture, and proper documentation so your team can confidently own the codebase.

feature3.title: Responsive on All Devices
feature3.desc: Every interface we build is designed to work well on mobile, tablet, and desktop from the start.

feature4.title: Performance-Focused Engineering
feature4.desc: We optimize Core Web Vitals, accessibility, and SEO as part of the build — not an afterthought.

feature5.title: Architecture That Scales
feature5.desc: We design systems with growth in mind — clean separation of concerns, sensible data models, and room to expand.

feature6.title: Direct Team Access
feature6.desc: You communicate directly with the engineers building your product — no account managers in between.

Technologies.title: Technologies We Work With
Technologies.subtitle: We pick tools based on the problem — proven, well-supported technologies that make long-term maintenance straightforward.

Testimonials.title: What Clients Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials from clients who have worked with us on real projects.
Testimonials.emptySubtitle: We're collecting feedback from clients. Check back soon.

test1.name: Sarah Al-Mansoor
test1.quote: ConnectX transformed our legacy fintech core into a blazing-fast Next.js platform. Their commitment to clean architecture and Lighthouse performance saved us months of dev time.

test2.name: Marcus Vance
test2.quote: Working with ConnectX felt like adding a world-class engineering team to our company. They delivered our complex IoT logistics platform ahead of schedule with zero downtime.

test3.name: David Chen
test3.quote: The UI/UX refinement and mobile engineering ConnectX brought to our telemedicine app boosted our user retention by 70%. Their attention to micro-interactions is unmatched.

CTA.title: Ready to start your next project?
CTA.subtitle: Tell us what you're building. We'll get back to you within one business day.
CTA.perk3: Technical discussion on your first call

Footer.tagline: Modern software built for growth and long-term reliability.

About.title: About ConnectX Solutions
About.subtitle: A software development studio based in Egypt
About.missionText: ConnectX Solutions builds web applications, mobile platforms, and digital products. We work with clients from early-stage projects to established businesses, focusing on clean engineering, honest communication, and long-term maintainability.
About.storyText1: ConnectX Solutions was founded with a simple goal: to build software that works well and is easy to maintain. We started with web development and have since expanded to include mobile apps, cloud infrastructure, and product design.
About.storyText2: We are a small, focused team. We take on projects where we can do meaningful work and form real partnerships with our clients. Our approach is straightforward: understand the problem, plan carefully, build well, and support what we deliver.
About.excellenceDesc: We prefer fewer projects done well over many projects done quickly
About.innovationDesc: We choose tools that fit the problem, not the trend of the month
About.partnershipDesc: We build with maintainability in mind so your team can own the code
About.integrityDesc: We tell you what's realistic, not just what sounds good

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
